name: Tomb of the Great Pharaoh Tutankahmen
description:
This is the burial chamber of the well known and respected pharaoh Tutankahmen.
The walls are etched with sacred golden symbols and the coffin itself is made 
of one continuous piece of melded gold. Most of the fabled treasures which were
supposedly buried with this king have been stolen long ago by grave robbers, 
but enough has still been left here to make anyone prosperous.
